ValidationRule.description: Require Loss Reason and Loss Reason Details when StageName is Closed Lost.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed Lost"), OR( ISBLANK(TEXT(Loss_Reason__c)), ISBLANK(Loss_Reason_Details__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: When Stage is Closed Lost, populate Loss Reason and Loss Reason Details.
